ai_role: Custom AI ASICs and AI data-center networking
tvs_tiebreaker: Strong TVS can support ownership, but poor entry/risk quality should limit sizing.
technical_timing_rule: Technicals can gate adds; avoid chasing EXTENDED setups unless valuation and customer diversification improve.
rationale: Real AI infrastructure moat through custom silicon and networking, but risk is concentrated in a handful of hyperscaler roadmaps and a valuation that prices strong execution.
